    @allure.story("语音大厅CRUD")
    @allure.title("【场景】TC-VOICE-007~010 创建→修改→查询验证→删除语音大厅")
    @pytest.mark.P2
    def test_voice_hall_crud(self, community_api):
        """语音大厅：创建 → 修改名称和公告 → 查询验证 → 删除"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        hall_data = data["voice_hall"]
        random_id = random.randint(1000, 9999)
        channel_name = f"{hall_data['channel_name_prefix']}{random_id}"
        created_channel_id = None
    
        # Step 1: 创建语音大厅
        with allure.step("创建语音大厅"):
            resp = community_api.add_personal_server_topic_channel(
                channel_name=channel_name,
                group_id=-99,
                server_id=community["self_server_id"],
                channel_type=data["channel_type"]["voice_hall"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
            _assert_ret_code_100(result, "创建语音大厅")
            assert_field_exists(result, "retData", "创建返回数据不存在")
            created_channel_id = result["retData"].get("channelId")
>           assert created_channel_id is not None, f"未获取到频道ID: {result['retData']}"
